zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hancock於1506年10月出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德時，他的父親Sir Richard Hancock, Knight26歲，母親Joan Rachel Boris21歲。他於1520年與Lea Hancock在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年8月7日在英國德比夏爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hancock于1506年10月出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Richard Hancock, Knight26岁，母亲Joan Rachel Boris21岁。他于1520年与Lea Hancock在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年8月7日在英国德比夏爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hancock was born in October 1506, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Hancock, Knight, was 26 and his mother, Joan Rachel Boris, was 21. He married Lea Hancock in 1520, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 August 1570, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hancock est né en octobre 1506, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Hancock, Knight, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Rachel Boris, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lea Hancock en 1520, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 août 1570, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hancock im Oktober 1506 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Hancock, Knight 26 und seine Mutter Joan Rachel Boris 21. Er hat 1520 in England Lea Hancock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. August 1570 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hancock è nato il nel ottobre 1506 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Hancock, Knight, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Rachel Boris, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lea Hancock nel 1520, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 agosto 1570, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hancockが1506年10月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Hancock, Knightは26歳，母Joan Rachel Borisは21歳であった。1520年にイギリスでLea Hancockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年8月7日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hancock(이)가 1506년 10월 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Hancock, Knight(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Rachel Boris(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1520년 영국에서 Lea Hancock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 8월 7일 영국 더비실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hancock nasceu em outubro de 1506, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Hancock, Knight, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rachel Boris, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lea Hancock em 1520, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1570, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hancock родился октябрь 1506 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Hancock, Knight было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Rachel Boris, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lea Hancock в 1520 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 августа 1570 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hancock nació en octubre de 1506, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Hancock, Knight, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Rachel Boris, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lea Hancock en 1520, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1570, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
